reviews.review_description: I gave it a chance and I got proved wrong 5 dollars for 1 map then for each ride you have to pay an extra 4 dollars for more of these wierd rolercoster ride that doesn’t render correctly nor last more than a minute where they then give you a bow so you can pop bollons for some reason you’re better of throwing your money in a paper shredder
This was not worth paying for or downloading at all. You only get one ride, and have to pay even more money to ride the others.

The roller coaster feels very smooth and enjoyable. The ride is fun, exciting, and really entertaining. 😄
I had a great time playing it!
